untranslatable_reason: BARR Measure Rule requires manual identification of trend line, first quarter formation analysis, and precise lead-in height calculation from highest high to trend line. These geometric/structural measurements cannot be expressed with standard technical indicators. The pattern requires identifying a specific trendline visually and measuring vertical distance to it, which exceeds indicator-based condition capabilities. Breakout detection via dc_lower is possible, but the core measurement rule (lead-in height subtraction from breakout point) requires pattern recognition beyond available indicators.
